_comment: Bundle-size budgets (#750) — per-chunk gzip ceiling in bytes. MEASURED from a real production build (npm run build) plus a 10% headroom margin, then checked in. Regenerate with `node scripts/check-bundle-budget.mjs --update` after an intentional, reviewed size change. The check-bundle-budget gate fails when a chunk's gzip size exceeds its budget here.
measuredAt: Baseline gzip sizes at generation time were below these budgets by the headroom margin; see git history for the build that set them.
